title: ONE FOR ALL Essential 6 URC3661 Universal Remote Control

keySpecs.label: Works with all AV devices with IR remote controls

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

OVERVIEW.Compatibility: TVs, Set top boxes, Streaming devices, Audio devices, DVD players, Other IR devices
OVERVIEW.Other features: Code setup, Learning feature, Full backlight, 3 smart activity keys, 3 app shortcut keys, Favourite channel key, SteriTouch antimicrobial protection

GENERAL.Dimensions: 230 x 103 x 35 mm (H x W x D)
GENERAL.Box contents: One for All Essential 6 URC3661 Universal Remote Control, Quick setup guide

description.main: Control your whole entertainment centre and switch between 6 devices with this universal remote. It's fully backlit, so you can easily find the right button when watching late at night.
goodToKnow: Control your whole entertainment centre and switch between 6 devices
Fully backlit for easy use in the dark
Shortcut buttons for favourite channels and streaming apps
Customise the controls with the learning feature
